nl: Structural Consistency: For any feature i, if SI_i(f) > 0, then ∃ x: φ_i(f̂, x) > 0
nl_long: If feature i has non-zero structural importance in the ground-truth data-generating process f, then the attribution must be strictly positive for at least some input x. The axiom binds attribution to real-world structure, not just predictor behavior.

anchors.evidence: f̂ 错位时医生看 attribution 错位, 跨文化共识: 归因不应骗人
用户对归因有'真实反映'的期待

anchors.concept: 回到事物本身(回到 f 而非 f̂)

citations.verbatim: Structural Importance SI_i(f) measures the impact of feature i in the underlying data-generating process f

process_meta.[AH-HA]: SC 作用在 f, 其他 axiom 作用在 f̂ —— 这不对称是创新点
process_meta.[HUNCH]: 如果 SC 也作用 f̂, 就退化为 STY17 Sensitivity
process_meta.user_evaluation: 用户已确认(2026-06-09, 作为 mainline theorem 的一部分)
